source_confidence.rationale: All core claims trace to Aleyda Solis's own published content on aleydasolis.com and learningaisearch.com (Tier A sources). Career details are from her official homepage and SEOFOMO hub. Additional third-party validation from Clayton Johnson's summary and EDGE of the Web podcast.

freshness.notes: AI search optimization content from LearningAIsearch.com was updated March 2026. SEOFOMO newsletter is active weekly (latest April 2026). SP2 framework is from 2020 but remains her core methodology. Book is from 2016 but covers foundational process orientation still referenced in her current work.

The AirOps interview corroborates key themes with direct quotes from a webinar context.

freshness.notes: AI Search Manual is actively maintained by iPullRank (copyright 2025). Science of SEO book is forthcoming (August 2026). AirOps interview updated April 2025.
